issues.title: Placeholder text fails WCAG AA contrast at small font sizes
All interactive elements remove focus indicator without replacement
All touch targets are below 44x44px minimum
Pure gray palette — no brand tint
Missing semantic HTML landmarks (header, main, footer)
No skip link for keyboard navigation
Placeholder text used as label proxy on context field
Inter is the single most overused font in production UIs
Example result panels toggle with no entrance animation
Loading button state has no aria-live announcement
Scrollbar border-radius (3px) conflicts with card radius (8px)
No zoom prevention on pinch gestures
HTML entities used for status icons instead of inline SVG
Skeleton uses hard-coded hex colors instead of CSS custom properties
Table overflow on mobile may cause header misalignment
